name: Ben & Jerrys' Heath Bar Crunch Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups heavy cream or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a sharp knife, cut the Heath bars into half-inch to one-inch chunks. You should have about one cup. Put them in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap before placing it in the freezer.
2. Whisk eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy (approximately 1-2 minutes). Add sugar gradually, whisking continuously until well blended (about another minute). Mix in cream, milk, and vanilla extract to blend.
3. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
4. After the ice cream has stiffened (about two minutes before it is fully frozen), stir in the Heath bar pieces. Continue freezing until ready to serve. Makes about one quart.
